# joaquinbressan.com

> Joaquin Bressan. Builder for the agent era.

## About
Personal site of Joaquin Bressan. Co-founder, builder, computer engineer based in Spain.
Building infrastructure for the agent era. Exploring what identity and trust look like when AI agents are the users.

## Endpoints
- GET / — Human-readable site (HTML). AI agents are automatically served structured markdown.
- GET /api/info — Structured info endpoint. Supports Accept: text/markdown and Accept: application/json.
- POST /api/chat — Conversational AI endpoint. Body: { "message": "your question" }. Rate limited: 5 req/min. Max 500 chars.
- GET /llms.txt — This file.

## Contact
- Email: joaquinbressan@gmail.com
- X: @joaquinbressann
- GitHub: JoaquinBN
- LinkedIn: joaquin-bressan

## Structured Data
For machine-readable data, request /api/info with Accept: application/json header.
